page_content:
EDSP898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits)

EDSP899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits) Registration required to the extent of 6-9 hours for an Ed.D. Project and 12-18 hours for a Ph.D. dissertation.

EDSP850 Intervention Research in Special Education (3 Credits) Focuses on the design and implementation of intervention research studies in the ﬁeld of Special Education. This course will focus on knowledge and skills necessary for (a) evaluating the quality of group and single case design intervention research and related conceptual and methodological issues (e.g., replication, ﬁdelity of implementation), (b) designing and evaluating interventions, (c) implementing interventions in schools, and (d) translating research to practice. Prerequisite: EDSP860. Recommended: EDMS646.

EDSP860 Doctoral Research Seminar (3 Credits) Issues and procedures relevant to conducting and analyzing research in special education.
